recentTweets.text: RT @RepThomasMassie: This is absurd. Every piece of voter data Trump mentions here, as well as which elections each voter voted in, is read…
Truly amazing bald face, internally disprovable lie. Read the tweet and the document. They don’t say the same thing at all.

Here’s the whole game, which I warned about in the NYT: cite a single source, uncorroborated and dubious report as ALL CAPS FACT. 

I wonder how Mr. Libs thought about the Steele Dossier. I’m sure he featured it in ALL CAPS.
RT @Ike_Saul: To sum up: The White House proved tonight that it's unclear whether even third world teapot dictators can actually rig their…
And many of my Republican colleagues happily spread the lies generated by Russian intelligence.
No. It’s not. This is the intelligence community (made up of competent patriots, therefore foreign to you) working together to produce carefully crafted reporting.
RT @dnvolz: A reminder that bears repeating: Trump has systematically dismantled election security efforts within the federal government du…

One of the many many lies. The cyber expert whose document is shown below had his lone dissent prominently featured in the publicly-available Intelligence Community Assessment of 1/2021. You could look it up.
RT @atrupar: Rep. Himes: "The president was setting the basis for him to turn around on election night and say, 'I warned you that the Chin…

Donald Trump just lied to the American people. Make no mistake, he is laying the foundation so that if Election Day goes badly for Republicans he can  turned around and claim foul play by our adversaries. 

Our elections continue to be safe and secure from foreign interference,
RT @nytopinion: In President Trump’s prime-time speech Thursday evening, “there are a number of ways he can muddy the waters by abusing the…
Read more: https://t.co/DQqjgVkBnP

But the American people should remain confident that our elections are secure from interference, largely because of the thousands of patriotic Americans in the intelligence community, in election offices and in polling places themselves. Everything is just noise.

Trump is likely going to try to muddy the waters by misrepresenting or selectively declassifying information. He wants to sow doubt around the past elections and the upcoming midterms, no matter the cost.
But I want to be absolutely clear: the House Intelligence Committee has never been provided any intelligence to suggest that the 2020 election, or any election, was tampered with.

There were legitimate threats from Russia, Iran, and China. But these were influence operations, not direct interference. This is the type of thing that the IC should be monitoring, and one reason why it’s so concerning that the Admin has gutted the offices meant to secure
A 2021 report from the DOJ, DHS, and FBI found the same: https://t.co/9Sc3zSBIaC https://t.co/KVSeBUyPdq

Here is the unclassified 2020 Intelligence Community Assessment, prepared under @CIADirector (then DNI). This finding is backed by the classified report, and is consistent with reports released by the IC following every federal election in the last decade. https://t.co/RTexbydyiS

Tonight, @POTUS is reportedly going to claim that he has intelligence to prove that he, not Joe Biden, actually won in 2020. That’s a lie.

There is no credible intelligence whatsoever that the 2020 election was anything other than fully secure, fair, and accurate. 🧵

There is zero credible intelligence to support Trump’s debunked claims about the 2020 election, but that doesn’t mean he won’t abuse the intelligence community to push his conspiracy. I wrote about what that might look like: https://t.co/DQqjgVl9dn
Exactly
Settler violence in the West Bank must stop now.
It’s way past time for the courts to start taking action against Trump’s acolyte attorneys who bring insane ideas, grievances and conspiracy theories to the courts. https://t.co/0aOUlaKgVr

You don’t say….

¡Que viva Puerto Rico! https://t.co/vEzrcefwFz

Only one is being called on by his party to drop out.

Both sides a…

Pay for your catastrophic never-ending  Iran war out of the $200 billion you appropriated for ICE to terrorize our communities.

You can eat your own cooking on this one.

We really do need to bring back high school civics.

This is not your grandpa’s GOP.
Not your job. Focus on our national security please.

Everywhere I go in CT people tell me they’re getting crushed by housing costs. Last night Congress finally did something about it. The housing bill we passed is a real first step to bringing down rents and getting more people into homes. Huge win. https://t.co/l9rNGJK8LI

RT @JoeKhalilTV: “We are concerned that your record as Director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency demonstrates a willingness to misuse…

Had this happened under Obama, dozens of neocon senators, congressmen and advocacy groups would have lost their minds. Now they sit meek and deferential to the man who finally brought about and lost their long hoped-for war with Iran.

The core function of the Intelligence Community is to speak truth to power. Sometimes those truths are hard and unpopular and win you no friends. But you deliver them. Or you get Iraq.

Acting  like a teen at a Taylor Swift concert does not help the IC do its job.

Happy Father’s Day to all my fellow fathers!

Not always easy, but definitely the best job ever!

As the law requires, you must

save every text, 
save every email,
save every document,
save every transcript.

Congress will review them all.
Well. That’s some Community Note.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for James A. Himes. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Iraq / Baghdad / Kirkuk.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 0 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-21T18:53:48Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
